title: AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
summary: Matthew Raynor is an AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer with 3 years of experience building production-grade software. His work spans computer vision, LLM integration, agentic AI systems, and full-stack web development using React, TypeScript, Django, and modern cloud tooling. Four production applications live. Freelancing from Hampton Bays, NY and seeking a full-time remote role.
current_status: Freelance developer, actively seeking full-time remote position
specializations: Computer Vision (TensorFlow.js, MediaPipe, OpenCV, YOLO, ONNX Runtime)
LLM Integration (LangChain, Claude API, OpenAI, RAG systems, pgvector)
Full-Stack Web Development (React, TypeScript, Django, Next.js)

totetaxi.description: Full-stack luxury delivery platform with LangGraph AI agent (6 tools, SSE streaming), dynamic pricing engine, Stripe payments, Onfleet dispatch, dual authentication, and 310+ backend tests

agentic_ai_shopping_assistant.description: Full e-commerce platform with AI shopping assistant using LangChain and Claude — pgvector semantic search, MiDaS depth estimation for wall visualization, Claude Vision metadata, Stripe Checkout

idp_easycapture.description: Enterprise computer vision pipeline using TensorFlow.js, MediaPipe, and OpenCV for real-time photo validation, background compositing, and auto-capture

eric_art_mover.description: Operations platform for fine art logistics business with calendar scheduling, PDF invoicing, and AJAX-powered forms

skyclip.description: Native desktop AI video editor for automated drone footage analysis and highlight reel generation using CLIP embeddings, Claude API, and FFmpeg

mattys_crew.description: Real-time care team scheduling platform with WebSocket updates, multi-view calendar, JWT auth, and AWS SES/SNS notifications

approach: Methodical engineering — plans deeply, breaks down problems clearly, and designs systems that scale. Specializes in taking complex real-world processes and transforming them into clean, reliable, user-friendly software.
background: Former commercial fisherman who rebuilt his life through code and creativity. Three years of building, four live production applications, and a portfolio that speaks for itself.
